# Python runtime dependencies for the Shiny app (predict_model.py + CP).
# Pinned to the versions verified working in the `hu_ssc` conda env on 2026-06-21.
# Python 3.10 required (model was pickled under 3.10).
#
# Install into a fresh env, e.g.:
#   conda create -n hu_ssc python=3.10 -y
#   conda activate hu_ssc
#   pip install -r requirements_app.txt

numpy==2.2.6
pandas==2.3.3
scipy==1.15.3
scikit-learn==1.7.2
torch==2.9.1
torchtuples==0.2.2
einops==0.8.1
tab-transformer-pytorch==0.5.3
pycox==0.3.0
matplotlib==3.10.7          # only needed for the offline CP plotting script, not the app
